roles.name: Goalkeeper
roles.description: Traditional goalkeeper. Stays on the line, focuses on shot-stopping.

focusDesc.Defend: Won't rush out to collect long or loose balls. Low risk.
focusDesc.Balanced: Occasionally leaves area to collect long or loose balls.

roles.name: Sweeper Keeper
roles.description: Modern keeper who stops attacks and supports build-up play.

focusDesc.Balanced: Leaves area to collect balls close to the box.
focusDesc.Build-Up: Pushes higher up to collect the ball and support play.

roles.name: Ball-Playing Keeper
roles.description: Focused on supporting build-up play. Stays on line during defensive phases.

focusDesc.Build-Up: Actively joins build-up, offers safe passing option. Doesn't rush far out.

roles.name: Defender
roles.description: No-nonsense CB who excels at the basics and maintains the defensive line.

focusDesc.Defend: Focuses only on defensive responsibilities. Stays back.
focusDesc.Balanced: Steps up to close down attackers when needed.

roles.name: Stopper
roles.description: Ball-winning CB who steps forward to tackle, intercept and press.

focusDesc.Balanced: Intercepts passes and pressures attackers receiving the ball.
focusDesc.Aggressive: Pushes into base of midfield to intercept and close down.
focusDesc.Defend: Holds position, steps up only when necessary.

roles.name: Ball-Playing Defender
roles.description: Modern CB comfortable on the ball. Moves forward/wider to support build-up.

focusDesc.Defend: Steps up a little to support teammates during possession.
focusDesc.Build-Up: Moves into a holding DM role during possession.
focusDesc.Aggressive: Focuses on intercepting passes and closing down opponents.

roles.name: Wide Back
roles.description: Central defender who shifts wide to cover advancing fullbacks. Ideal in back-three.

focusDesc.Defend: Protects the back line, tracks opposition down the wings.
focusDesc.Aggressive: Steps higher or wider to press opponents early.
focusDesc.Support: Covers defensive duties and extends possession down the flank.

roles.name: Fullback
roles.description: Wide defender prioritising protecting their own goal. Holds line and offers passing option.

focusDesc.Defend: Moves inside to form a back three when team is in possession.
focusDesc.Balanced: Given more freedom to push slightly forward and wider.
focusDesc.Versatile: Adapts between defensive and offensive duties based on game state.

roles.name: Falseback
roles.description: Modern fullback who adopts a central position when team has the ball.

focusDesc.Balanced: Positions as a Central Midfielder when team is in possession.
focusDesc.Defend: Operates as a Defensive Midfielder when team has the ball.

roles.name: Wingback
roles.description: Versatile and stamina-driven. Pushes upfield to support attacks, then returns to defend.

focusDesc.Support: Only attacks with controlled possession. Defends when ball is lost.
focusDesc.Balanced: License to stay forward even out of possession, or drop back as needed.

roles.name: Attacking Wingback
roles.description: Technically a defender but more concerned with getting forward and offering width.

focusDesc.Balanced: Rarely sprints back to defend unless hit on the counter.
focusDesc.Attack: Pushes even higher up the pitch. Fewer defensive duties.

roles.name: Inverted Wingback
roles.description: Cuts inside to support central play rather than hugging the touchline.

focusDesc.Build-Up: Moves centrally to support possession and link midfield.
focusDesc.Attack: Pushes into the box as an extra attacker.

roles.name: Fullback
roles.description: Wide defender prioritising protecting their own goal. Holds line and offers passing option.

focusDesc.Defend: Moves inside to form a back three when team is in possession.
focusDesc.Balanced: Given more freedom to push slightly forward and wider.
focusDesc.Versatile: Adapts between defensive and offensive duties based on game state.

roles.name: Falseback
roles.description: Modern fullback who adopts a central position when team has the ball.

focusDesc.Balanced: Positions as a Central Midfielder when team is in possession.
focusDesc.Defend: Operates as a Defensive Midfielder when team has the ball.

roles.name: Wingback
roles.description: Versatile and stamina-driven. Pushes upfield to support attacks, then returns to defend.

focusDesc.Support: Only attacks with controlled possession. Defends when ball is lost.
focusDesc.Balanced: License to stay forward even out of possession, or drop back as needed.

roles.name: Attacking Wingback
roles.description: Technically a defender but more concerned with getting forward and offering width.

focusDesc.Balanced: Rarely sprints back to defend unless hit on the counter.
focusDesc.Attack: Pushes even higher up the pitch. Fewer defensive duties.

roles.name: Inverted Wingback
roles.description: Cuts inside to support central play rather than hugging the touchline.

focusDesc.Build-Up: Moves centrally to support possession and link midfield.
focusDesc.Attack: Pushes into the box as an extra attacker.

roles.name: Holding
roles.description: Dedicated to protecting the backline. Defends aggressively or covers passing lanes.

focusDesc.Ball-Winning: Aggressively wins the ball and intercepts passes.
focusDesc.Roaming: Moves across the pitch to close passing lanes and press attackers.
focusDesc.Defend: Stays deeper, protects the defence, offers a passing outlet.

roles.name: Deep-Lying Playmaker
roles.description: Creative midfielder who builds play from deep. Supports defence and attack with incisive passing.

focusDesc.Build-Up: Moves forward and supports attacks with passes.
focusDesc.Roaming: Moves across the pitch width to offer support.
focusDesc.Defend: Holds position, breaks up opposition moves, distributes from deep.

roles.name: Centre-Half
roles.description: Drops back between the CBs in possession. Extra cover against counter attacks.

focusDesc.Defend: Drops into the defensive line, provides cover and security.

roles.name: Wide Half
roles.description: Covers sides of the pitch and fills wide defensive positions when needed.

focusDesc.Build-Up: Supports moves out wide and pushes forward into wide areas.
focusDesc.Defend: Drops into fullback or wingback positions as needed.

roles.name: Box Crasher
roles.description: Surprise runner from deep midfield. Times runs into the box for goal-scoring opportunities.

focusDesc.Balanced: Balances defensive duties with timely runs into the attacking box.

roles.name: Box-to-Box
roles.description: Energetic midfielder who contributes at both ends of the pitch.

focusDesc.Balanced: Balances attacking and defensive contributions across the pitch.
focusDesc.Ball-Winning: More aggressive in duels and pressing. Prioritises winning the ball back.

roles.name: Holding
roles.description: Sits deep in midfield to protect the backline and screen the defence.

focusDesc.Defend: Stays disciplined, screens the defence, limits forward runs.

roles.name: Deep-Lying Playmaker
roles.description: Builds play from deep central areas. Creative but disciplined.

focusDesc.Defend: Holds position while distributing the ball from deep.

roles.name: Playmaker
roles.description: Creative midfielder who links midfield and attack with clever passing and movement.

focusDesc.Attack: Pushes forward to create chances. More advanced positioning.
focusDesc.Roaming: Moves freely to find pockets of space and link play.

roles.name: Half-Winger
roles.description: Wide-positioned midfielder who can stretch play or cut inside.

focusDesc.Support: Offers width and link-up play without overcommitting forward.
focusDesc.Balanced: Balances wide support with central involvement.
focusDesc.Attack: Pushes high and wide to stretch the defence and create chances.

roles.name: Winger
roles.description: Wide attacker who hugs the touchline, delivers crosses or cuts inside.

focusDesc.Balanced: Mix of wide play and tracking back. Moderate defensive duties.
focusDesc.Attack: Pushes as high and wide as possible. Minimal defensive work.
focusDesc.Versatile: Adapts role based on game state and team positioning.

roles.name: Wide Midfielder
roles.description: Traditional wide midfielder with strong defensive and offensive contributions.

focusDesc.Defend: Prioritises defensive tracking and wide defensive coverage.
focusDesc.Support: Offers width and passing options without overcommitting either way.
focusDesc.Build-Up: Drops deeper to support possession and link play.

roles.name: Wide Playmaker
roles.description: Creative wide player who finds pockets of space and creates chances from the flank.

focusDesc.Attack: Pushes forward to create chances from wide areas.

roles.name: Inside Forward
roles.description: Wide attacker who cuts inside onto their stronger foot to shoot or create.

focusDesc.Balanced: Cuts inside but also tracks back. Balanced contribution.
focusDesc.Attack: Stays high and central. Minimal defensive duties.

roles.name: Winger
roles.description: Wide attacker who hugs the touchline, delivers crosses or cuts inside.

focusDesc.Balanced: Mix of wide play and tracking back. Moderate defensive duties.
focusDesc.Attack: Pushes as high and wide as possible. Minimal defensive work.
focusDesc.Versatile: Adapts role based on game state and team positioning.

roles.name: Wide Midfielder
roles.description: Traditional wide midfielder with strong defensive and offensive contributions.

focusDesc.Defend: Prioritises defensive tracking and wide defensive coverage.
focusDesc.Support: Offers width and passing options without overcommitting either way.
focusDesc.Build-Up: Drops deeper to support possession and link play.

roles.name: Wide Playmaker
roles.description: Creative wide player who finds pockets of space and creates chances from the flank.

focusDesc.Attack: Pushes forward to create chances from wide areas.

roles.name: Inside Forward
roles.description: Wide attacker who cuts inside onto their stronger foot to shoot or create.

focusDesc.Balanced: Cuts inside but also tracks back. Balanced contribution.
focusDesc.Attack: Stays high and central. Minimal defensive duties.

roles.name: Playmaker
roles.description: Creative #10 who links midfield and attack. Creates chances through clever movement.

focusDesc.Balanced: Stays in half-space, balanced contribution in and out of possession.
focusDesc.Roaming: Moves freely to find space and create overloads.

roles.name: Shadow Striker
roles.description: Makes late runs beyond the striker. Arrives in the box from deep positions.

focusDesc.Attack: Pushes high, makes runs beyond the striker, focuses on scoring.

roles.name: Half-Winger
roles.description: Drifts wide from CAM position to stretch the play and create from the flank.

focusDesc.Roaming: Moves freely across the width of the pitch.
focusDesc.Balanced: Balances central and wide involvement.
focusDesc.Attack: Stays high and wide. More of an additional winger.

roles.name: Classic 10
roles.description: Traditional number 10. Drops deep to receive, turns, and plays forward.

focusDesc.Versatile: Flexible role - adapts between deep and high positions.
focusDesc.Wide: Drifts wide to find space and create from wider areas.
focusDesc.Attack: Stays high centrally, acts as a second striker.

roles.name: Winger
roles.description: Wide attacker who hugs the touchline, delivers crosses, or cuts inside.

focusDesc.Balanced: Mix of wide play and tracking back. Moderate defensive duties.
focusDesc.Attack: Pushes as high and wide as possible. Minimal defensive work.
focusDesc.Versatile: Adapts role based on game state and team positioning.

roles.name: Inside Forward
roles.description: Cuts inside onto stronger foot to shoot or create. Threatens goal directly.

focusDesc.Balanced: Cuts inside but also tracks back. Balanced contribution.
focusDesc.Attack: Stays high. Cuts inside aggressively. Minimal defensive duties.
focusDesc.Roaming: Moves freely to find pockets of space across the front line.

roles.name: Wide Playmaker
roles.description: Creative wide player who creates chances from the flank with clever passing.

focusDesc.Attack: Pushes high and wide. Focuses on creating chances from the left.

roles.name: Winger
roles.description: Wide attacker who hugs the touchline, delivers crosses, or cuts inside.

focusDesc.Balanced: Mix of wide play and tracking back. Moderate defensive duties.
focusDesc.Attack: Pushes as high and wide as possible. Minimal defensive work.
focusDesc.Versatile: Adapts role based on game state and team positioning.

roles.name: Inside Forward
roles.description: Cuts inside onto stronger foot to shoot or create. Threatens goal directly.

focusDesc.Balanced: Cuts inside but also tracks back. Balanced contribution.
focusDesc.Attack: Stays high. Cuts inside aggressively. Minimal defensive duties.
focusDesc.Roaming: Moves freely to find pockets of space across the front line.

roles.name: Wide Playmaker
roles.description: Creative wide player who creates chances from the flank with clever passing.

focusDesc.Attack: Pushes high and wide. Focuses on creating chances from the right.

roles.name: Advanced Forward
roles.description: Traditional striker who makes runs in behind and finishes in the box.

focusDesc.Attack: Pushes the defensive line back constantly. Focuses on scoring.
focusDesc.Versatile: Drops deeper to link play or runs in behind depending on game state.

roles.name: Poacher
roles.description: Penalty box specialist who focuses entirely on being in the right place to score.

focusDesc.Attack: Stays central and high. Always in position to finish.
focusDesc.Versatile: Adapts positioning depending on build-up play.

roles.name: False 9
roles.description: Drops into midfield to create space and link play. Pulls CBs out of position.

focusDesc.Build-Up: Drops deep consistently to link midfield and attack.
focusDesc.Attack: Balances dropping deep with runs in behind.

roles.name: Target Forward
roles.description: Powerful physical striker who holds up the ball and brings others into play.

focusDesc.Balanced: Mix of holding up play and making runs in behind.
focusDesc.Attack: Stays central and high, focuses on winning headers and finishing.
focusDesc.Wide: Drifts wide to create space centrally and receive crosses.
